data.title: Celebrate 12th Annual Teach Music Week with FREE lessons at 1,200+ locations. Happening March 16-22, 2026.
data.description: Philadelphia, on February 19, 2026 - Keep Music Alive is pleased to reveal the upcoming 12th Annual Teach Music Week set to take place from Monday, March 16th to Sunday, March 22nd, 2026. This highly anticipated week-long event serves as a celebration that welcomes participation from musicians, music schools, music stores, and various music-related entities.

data.title: American Signature home furnishings chain faces liquidation, with 89 stores and warehouses across 16 states up for sale.
data.description: A real estate firm, A&G Real Estate Partners, has been commissioned to oversee the sale of 89 stores and warehouses located in 16 states across the United States. This initiative comes as part of the liquidation process for the home furnishings retailer American Signature, with A&G representing the successful stalking-horse bidder. The extensive portfolio being marketed includes a range of commercial properties, indicating a substantial transaction volume that will impact the national real estate market.

data.title: Tom Madigan joins Thimble Island Private Wealth, bringing $300 million in assets from UBS to LPL Financial.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, LPL Financial LLC revealed that financial advisor Tom Madigan, CEPA®, has recently partnered with the company's broker-dealer, Registered Investment Advisor (RIA), and custodial platforms. He will be collaborating with Thimble Island Private Wealth, a firm already backed by LPL Strategic Wealth (SW). Madigan brings with him a substantial $300 million in advisory, brokerage, and retirement assets* and has made this transition from UBS.

data.title: ModelFront introduces Automatic Post-Editing (APE), now available to all customers, starting in 2024. Quality Prediction (QP) AI improves translation quality.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, ModelFront has unveiled the launch of automatic post-editing (APE), an exclusive custom large language model. Initially introduced in 2024, APE is now accessible to all ModelFront clients, being automatically integrated into production and included as a standard feature from the beginning. ModelFront's quality prediction (QP) uses AI to evaluate and amend AI translations. It autonomously assesses segments that would typically require human verification in their unedited state, prompting human involvement only for those that necessitate further attention.

data.title: Amplitude Inc (NASDAQ: AMPL) reported Q4 earnings in line with estimates, but forecasted lower adjusted EPS and sales for FY2026.
data.description: Amplitude Inc announced its fourth-quarter earnings, with reported earnings of 4 cents per share, in line with analyst expectations. The company's quarterly sales totaled $91.427 million, surpassing the estimated $90.344 million. Looking ahead to FY2026, Amplitude anticipates an adjusted EPS of between 8 cents and 13 cents, falling short of the market's 12-cent estimate. Sales projections for the year range from $390.000 million to $398.000 million, slightly below estimates of $390.120 million. The company noted a shift towards AI-driven analytics, emphasizing enhanced product monitoring capabilities.

data.title: Dow Jones drops before jobless claims; Carvana stock falls post-earnings. Live updates on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline as investors awaited the weekly jobless claims. Carvana's stock saw a significant drop following their earnings report. The Dow Jones index dropped on Thursday, and Carvana's stock plunged, impacting the overall market. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily, providing updates on the market's performance. Stay tuned for further developments and analysis regarding the market's movements.

data.title: Asendia USA, an e-commerce shipping provider, reflects on 2025 with resilience and growth despite challenges.
data.description: In Philadelphia on February 19, 2026, Asendia USA, a prominent player in global e-commerce logistics, looks back at the events of the 2025 peak season. Despite facing more hurdles in 2025 than in 2024, the company reported a continued expansion in the global e-commerce sector. The year was marked by a focus on resilience, substantial investments, and strategic planning for future advancements. Although exact figures were not disclosed, the company seems positioned for significant growth in the foreseeable future.

data.title: Learning Resources' Mini Farmstand Sorting Set wins 2026 Preschool Toy of the Year Award. Celebrating innovation in early childhood education.
data.description: Learning Resources®, a renowned toy company focusing on creating educational toys to ignite curiosity and foster a love for learning among children, was recently acknowledged for its innovations in early childhood education and play by The Toy Association and The Toy Foundation. The company, based in VERNON HILLS, Illinois, received this recognition on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Fed performed a 'rate check' on dollar-yen rate for White House; dollar dipped from ¥158.50 on Jan 23 to ¥152.45 on Jan 27.
data.description: The Federal Reserve recently considered intervening in the currency markets by performing a "rate check" on the dollar-yen exchange rate for the White House. The Fed's January meeting minutes revealed that private market participants had predicted a weakening dollar, but the strong performance of the U.S. economy altered forecasts. The dollar has been strengthening against the yen, inching towards the ¥160 mark. Subsequently, the U.S. Treasury requested the Fed's trading desk to quote a large yen purchase to devalue the dollar and elevate the Japanese currency. Following this action, the dollar depreciated significantly from ¥158.50 to ¥152.45 on January 27, an abnormal move for major currencies. This information sheds light on the Fed's potential involvement in influencing the currency markets.

data.title: Chargeflow makes G2's 2026 Best Software Awards for Best Commerce Software Products, a top chargeback management tool.
data.description: In a recent announcement on February 19, 2026, Chargeflow, a prominent platform specializing in chargeback management and fraud prevention for online merchants, revealed its recognition in G2's 2026 Best Software Awards. The company secured a place on the esteemed Best Commerce Software Products list. Being acknowledged by G2, a renowned software marketplace, underscores Chargeflow's excellence in serving eCommerce businesses worldwide.

data.title: Shearwater Health earns full 3-year NCQA accreditation with 100% score, showcasing commitment to quality and compliance.
data.description: Shearwater Health, based in Nashville, Tennessee, has achieved a noteworthy milestone by obtaining a complete 3-year accreditation from NCQA, scoring a perfect 100%. This accomplishment underscores Shearwater Health's commitment to maintaining high standards in quality, adherence to regulations, and enhancing health results. The accreditation was granted on February 19, 2026, solidifying Shearwater Health's position as a top provider of clinician-driven clinical outsourcing services.

The nonprofit, focused on aiding parents, children, and youths in the First Supervisorial District of Los Angeles, joined forces with the Chinatown Service Center and God's Pantry for this initiative.

data.title: Stock futures fall amid US-Iran tensions & disappointing news from Walmart. Dow Jones -0.12%, S&P 500 -0.08%, Nasdaq 100 -0.08% dip._trade deficit at $70.3 billion. Jobless claims drop to 206,000. FedWatch projects 94% likelihood of unchanged rates in March. DoorDash stock rises 13.57% premarket despite weak Q4 results.
data.description: U.S. stock futures dropped on Thursday following a rise the previous day, with all major benchmark indices seeing a decrease. The U.S. trade deficit widened to $70.3 billion in December due to lower exports and higher imports. Initial jobless claims fell to 206,000, lower than anticipated. The Federal Reserve meeting minutes showed disagreement among officials on interest rate futures, with talks of rate increases to combat inflation. Indirect Iran-U.S. nuclear talks stalled, pushing oil prices up. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.10%, with a 3.47% yield on the two-year bond. The FedWatch tool projected a 94% likelihood of rates remaining unchanged in March. Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, and Russell 2000 indices were down. ETFs SPY and QQQ tracking S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 were also lower in premarket trading. DoorDash stock rose 13.57% despite weak Q4 results, with positive forecasts for Q1.

data.title: ESS appoints Randall Selesky as Chief Commercial Officer to boost global expansion efforts.
data.description: Wilsonville, Oregon - ESS has named Randall Selesky as their Chief Commercial Officer to drive worldwide expansion efforts. This strategic move aims to bolster growth for the company.
